title: Agent identity display and per-agent thresholds
description: Make Pending Enrollments and Alerts display agent hostnames with the agent id as secondary text, and add per-agent CPU, memory, disk, and network percentage-of-five-minute-average thresholds for warning, degraded, and critical transitions while retaining the existing absolute fallback caps.
acceptance_criteria: Pending Enrollments shows hostname as the primary agent text and agent id as smaller secondary text.
Alerts shows hostname as the primary agent text and agent id as smaller secondary text when the alert agent is known.
Each approved agent can configure CPU, memory, disk, and network warning/degraded/critical percentage thresholds.
Per-agent thresholds override global server settings for that agent while existing absolute 70/85/95 fallback caps still apply.
Threshold settings persist across server restarts and are returned by the agents API.
BDD-style tests cover storage persistence, status-engine per-agent overrides, API payloads, and dashboard transformation/API client behavior.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Persist and evaluate per-agent thresholds
tasks.description: Add threshold columns to AgentRecord and SQLite storage, then teach StatusEngine to read agent-specific values before falling back to global settings.
acceptance_criteria: AgentRecord includes cpu/memory/disk/network warning, degraded, and critical percentage fields.
SqliteStore creates/migrates the threshold columns and preserves them on upsert.
StatusEngine::classify_percent accepts the agent id or threshold source and uses per-agent values before global settings.
Store and status engine tests cover threshold persistence and override behavior.

unit: Update server_tests/store_test.cpp with a GIVEN/WHEN/THEN scenario for persisting per-agent threshold columns.
Update server_tests/status_engine_test.cpp with a scenario proving a per-agent CPU threshold changes the generated status while absolute caps remain active.

tasks.implementation_notes: Modify server/store.hpp AgentRecord, server/store_sqlite.cpp schema/map_agent/upsert/selects, and server/status_engine.cpp classify_percent/evaluate_metrics. Use default values 125/150/200 to match current global settings.

tasks.title: Expose threshold settings through API
tasks.description: Return threshold settings in agent JSON and add an operator/admin endpoint to update per-agent thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/agents includes per-agent threshold values.
POST /api/agents/:id/thresholds validates CPU, memory, disk, and network warning/degraded/critical values.
Only users who can manage the agent can update thresholds.

unit: Update dashboard/src/api.test.ts for the new client endpoint payload.

tasks.implementation_notes: Modify server/api.cpp agent_to_json and routes near existing settings endpoints. Add Store interface and SqliteStore method for threshold updates.

tasks.title: Update dashboard identity display and controls
tasks.description: Render host/id identity consistently on Pending and Alerts pages and add per-agent threshold controls to Agent Management.
acceptance_criteria: Pending rows use the same primary hostname and secondary id pattern as Agent Management.
Alert rows use hostname plus agent id when the alert maps to a known agent.
Agent Management has editable CPU/memory/disk/network warning/degraded/critical controls.
Dashboard models and status tests cover alert-agent enrichment and threshold defaults.

unit: Update dashboard/src/status.test.ts to assert alerts can be enriched with agent display names and ids.
Update dashboard/src/api.test.ts to assert setAgentThresholds posts the expected JSON.

tasks.implementation_notes: Modify dashboard/src/models.ts, api.ts, status.ts, main.tsx, and styles.css. Build a small AgentIdentity component to avoid markup drift.

tasks.title: Document, version, and verify
tasks.description: Update configuration/dashboard docs, changelog, module version, format, and run focused tests plus a binary build.
acceptance_criteria: MODULE.bazel is incremented from 0.2.26 to 0.2.27.
CHANGELOG.md documents per-agent thresholds and identity rendering changes.
Docs describe threshold options and where to configure them.
Focused C++ and dashboard tests pass.
tasks.implementation_notes: Use clang-format on touched C++ files and npm/vitest for dashboard tests. Update docs/configuration.md, docs/dashboard.md, docs/running.md if needed.

nodes.label: Update dashboard identity display and controls

edges.label: API depends on stored threshold fields
Dashboard controls depend on API contract
